---
title: "Contact Information"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-1}
**Email:** [aktheexplorer\@gmail.com](mailto:aktheexplorer@gmail.com)
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-2}
**Phone:** (CA) +1 647-625-0780 / (GR) +30 697-439-4788
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-3}
**LinkedIn:** [View Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexandros-karagiannis-340739263/)
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-4}

------------------------------------------------------------------------
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-5}
[Download my CV](Alexandros_Karagiannis_CV.pdf)
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-5}
I am particularly interested in how applied statistics can be used across a wide range of fields, especially finance, economics, politics, and the life sciences. More broadly, I am interested in the role statistical methods can play in research generally, and in how statistical tools can be used to make forecasts and draw meaningful inferences across different kinds of fields.
:::

::: {.fade-up .fade-delay-6}
I believe that my experience and knowledge will serve as an asset in a professional setting where I can continue to grow as an individual while also make a meaningful contribution through my work. I am eager to use my background to support thoughtful decision-making, and contribute positively to society.
:::

::: contact-animation-wrap
<svg id="contact-points-animation" viewBox="0 0 900 260" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">

</svg>
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const svg = document.getElementById("contact-points-animation");
  if (!svg) return;

  const width = 900;
  const height = 260;
  const startTime = performance.now();

  function randomBetween(min, max) {
    return Math.random() * (max - min) + min;
  }

  function createPointSet(pointCount, vxRange, vyRange, rMin, rMax, delayMin, delayMax) {
    const pts = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < pointCount; i++) {
      pts.push({
        x: randomBetween(30, width - 30),
        y: randomBetween(30, height - 30),
        vx: randomBetween(vxRange[0], vxRange[1]),
        vy: randomBetween(vyRange[0], vyRange[1]),
        r: randomBetween(rMin, rMax),
        delay: randomBetween(delayMin, delayMax)
      });
    }
    return pts;
  }

  const bluePoints = createPointSet(34, [-0.35, 0.35], [-0.25, 0.25], 2.2, 4.2, 0, 900);
  const purplePoints = createPointSet(34, [-0.28, 0.28], [-0.18, 0.18], 2.0, 4.0, 300, 1300);

  function visiblePoints(points, elapsed) {
    return points.filter(p => elapsed >= p.delay);
  }

  function drawLines(points, lineClass, maxDist, opacityScale) {
    for (let i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
      for (let j = i + 1; j < points.length; j++) {
        const dx = points[i].x - points[j].x;
        const dy = points[i].y - points[j].y;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);

        if (dist < maxDist) {
          const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
          line.setAttribute("x1", points[i].x);
          line.setAttribute("y1", points[i].y);
          line.setAttribute("x2", points[j].x);
          line.setAttribute("y2", points[j].y);
          line.setAttribute("class", lineClass);
          line.style.opacity = (1 - dist / maxDist) * opacityScale;
          svg.appendChild(line);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  function drawPoints(points, pointClass) {
    for (const p of points) {
      const circle = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
      circle.setAttribute("cx", p.x);
      circle.setAttribute("cy", p.y);
      circle.setAttribute("r", p.r);
      circle.setAttribute("class", pointClass);
      svg.appendChild(circle);
    }
  }

  function updatePoints(points) {
    for (const p of points) {
      p.x += p.vx;
      p.y += p.vy;

      if (p.x <= 20 || p.x >= width - 20) p.vx *= -1;
      if (p.y <= 20 || p.y >= height - 20) p.vy *= -1;
    }
  }

  function draw(elapsed) {
    svg.innerHTML = "";

    const visibleBlue = visiblePoints(bluePoints, elapsed);
    const visiblePurple = visiblePoints(purplePoints, elapsed);

    drawLines(visibleBlue, "contact-line-blue", 120, 0.38);
    drawLines(visiblePurple, "contact-line-purple", 120, 0.30);

    drawPoints(visibleBlue, "contact-point-blue");
    drawPoints(visiblePurple, "contact-point-purple");
  }

  function animate(now) {
    const elapsed = now - startTime;

    updatePoints(bluePoints);
    updatePoints(purplePoints);
    draw(elapsed);

    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }

  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
});
</script>
```
